title: Visual Optimized
description: This Mod-pack was created to optimize and improve visual effects on version 1.20.1. (There will be updates to new versions in the future)
body:
### Visual Optimized | Description
This mod pack is based on mod packs [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) and this mod pack is created for optimization with improved visual effects. Helps weak PCs handle Minecraft. This Mod-Pak can be used on servers, and optimizes the game well on them. Below there will be links to all the mods used.

### Perfomance
Visual Optimized uses new mods for optimization (for example [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium), etc.). Also, this mod pack tries to improve the visual effects of Minecraft and does not spoil the impressions of the game.

### Why Sodium, and not Optifine?
Sodium is more optimized, unlike optifine. Fabric can be better optimized and is more vanilla than forge. It is intended for mods that add new items, biomes, etc.

### Help us
You can find bugs in our builds, or offer your help with the selection of mods for mod packs, or you can offer your mods for our builds and collaborate with us! You can contact us in [our discord server!](https://discord.gg/HXNm9j679a) Good luck.

![FPS compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f247a6b4c159c9f92f9492b14231937d7d55f984.jpeg)
